greet.text: "Turner." Conroy doesn't get up. New face, same voice — flat, patient, salaried. "You look rebuilt. The Dutchman does good work." He nudges a chair out with his boot. "Sit. I'm here about the biggest defection since the war, and you're here because you're the best extraction man alive. Currently."

retired.text: "You're recuperated. Different thing." He turns his glass a quarter turn, like a man moving a piece. "Hosaka's been paying for your beach, your clinic, your girl. You think that stops if you say no?" The smile arrives, technically. "Hear the name at least."

mitchell.text: "Christopher Mitchell. Maas Biolabs' hybridoma king — the man who made silicon obsolete. He wants to come over to Hosaka, and Maas would sooner burn him than lose him." Conroy slides a black chip across the table. "Full dossier. Site's already building in Arizona. Medicals, surgeons, jockeys — my people."

options.text: "What's wrong with the dossier?" (there's always something)

why_you.text: "Because Mitchell asked for you by name." Conroy lets that sit. "Man's been underground on a mesa for nine years and he knows your name. I'd find that flattering, personally. Or I'd find it interesting. You get paid either way."

gaps.text: For half a second the new face forgets which smile it was doing. "Sharp as ever. There are gaps. Medical section's thin — Maas security is biology, not code. Nobody's ever cracked it, nobody knows what he's carrying out." He shrugs. "That's site-level detail. Above both our gradients."

options.text: "I want the gaps filled before dawn." (then take the job)

accept.text: "Of course you are." Conroy stands, drops real paper money on the table like an antique gesture. "Charter leaves from the strip north of here. Don't bring the girl — she's Hosaka's, she stays with the set." At the door he pauses. "Good to have you back, Turner. Try to stay assembled."

bye.text: "Sleep on it," Conroy says to your back, unbothered, certain. "The beach was always a rental, Turner. You knew that going in." The worst part is that you did.
